prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 photorealistic fashion portrait of an elegant woman inspired by ancient Egyptian royalty standing close to the camera in warm golden sunlight. She has voluminous dark curly hair surrounding her head and shoulders, medium-brown glowing skin, a bare shoulder and collarbone, and a draped off-white linen one-shoulder garment like a classical Egyptian robe. Her face is deliberately hidden by one centered opaque square block in a warm medium-brown color, covering from forehead to chin while leaving the hair, ears, neck, and jewelry visible. She wears exactly 2 matching oversized statement earrings, one on each ear: turquoise, gold, and dark blue beaded scarab-wing designs with circular medallions, dangling vertically and echoing ancient Egyptian symbolism. The background is a textured tan papyrus-like wall covered with ancient Egyptian motifs, including exactly 3 prominent visible symbols: a black-and-gold winged scarab on the upper right, a large ankh behind the hair near the upper center-left, and another ankh panel on the mid-right; add additional faded geometric borders and wing patterns as wall decoration without readable modern text. Use warm cinematic sunlight, high contrast shadows, detailed skin and fabric texture, shallow portrait depth, realistic photography, rich amber and turquoise color palette, centered composition, no watermark, no extra people.
